stage_artifact_runtime.completion_rule: required outputs plus valid manifest plus RCA owner receipt
stage_artifact_runtime.orphan_rule: output files without valid manifest/receipt/evidence are not completed stages
stage_artifact_runtime.derived_projection_policy: status, stage_progress_log, gallery, and handoff are derived from Stage Folder contents; they are not first truth

stages.title: Source intake
stages.goal: Freeze source truth, audience, constraints, and missing-material risk before visual planning.
stages.summary: Source intake projected from RCA-owned route stages for OPL family discovery.

boundary_assumptions: RCA owns visual truth, review/export verdict, artifact authority, and visual memory decisions.
OPL admission only checks descriptor composition and cannot declare visual-ready, exportable, or handoffable.

stages.title: Communication strategy

boundary_assumptions: RCA owns visual truth, review/export verdict, artifact authority, and visual memory decisions.

notes: Descriptor-only projection over existing RCA route stages.
OPL provider may schedule stage attempts from this descriptor; it must not own RCA visual/artifact/review authority.
